(833 digits)
Verified by two independent methods:
1. Fraction DP (a000568_fast.py) — 672s
2. C batch CRT (a000568_c_batch.c) — ~500s

Performance comparison (Apple Silicon):
  Method              | n=50  | n=60  | n=76  | n=80
  --------------------|-------|-------|-------|-------
  Fraction DP         | 11.5s |  ~85s | 259s  | 672s
  gmpy2 DP            |  7.9s |  35s  | 300s  | ~500s
  C batch CRT         |  7.8s |  26s  | 314s  | OOM
  Numpy batch CRT     | 11.3s |  47s  | 346s  | N/A

Best practical approach: gmpy2 DP for moderate n, Fraction DP for large n.
C batch CRT wins for n≤60 but runs out of memory for n≥90.

State space peak: ~365K states for n=76, ~814K states for n=80.
